title.rendered: Prowler is Heading to AWS re:Invent in Las Vegas! 🚀

content.rendered:
We’re excited to announce that Prowler will be at AWS re:Invent 2024 next week in Las Vegas. Whether you’re passionate about cloud technology, a security expert, or simply love exploring the latest innovations, we’d love to connect with you.

Find Us at Booth 1971

We’re located near the Developer Lounge at Booth 1971. Stop by to discover what Prowler has in store and see how we’re advancing cloud security and compliance.

What’s Happening at Our Booth

  • Exclusive Swag
    Pick up limited-edition Prowler swag while supplies last.
  • Live Demos of Prowler 5
    Catch our platform in action with live demos at 10 AM, Noon, and 3 PM every day. See how Prowler 5 can enhance your cloud security strategy.
  • Meet the Prowler Team
    Our team is ready to answer your questions, share insights, and discuss how Prowler can support your needs.
  • 1:1 Sessions with Toni de la Fuente
    Book a one-on-one with our founder, Toni de la Fuente, to explore Prowler’s capabilities or discuss potential collaborations.

Don’t Miss Sessions

AWS will be hosting two hands-on workshops where you can dive deeper into optimizing and securing your AWS environment with Prowler using the latest tools and techniques. Whether you’re new to AWS or looking to refine your skills, these sessions are perfect for you.

Session Details

  • NTA405-R | Must-know techniques to optimize your AWS environment
    This workshop equips you with essential tools and techniques for optimizing your environments, even before changing a single line of code in your applications. Using hands-on exercises, you’ll learn to leverage AWS Cloud Financial Management tools, AWS Security Hub, and additional resources to identify cost savings, improve performance and resilience, and strengthen your security posture. Walk away equipped to take full control of your AWS environment and unlock its full potential. Bring your laptop to participate.
    • Tuesday, December 3 from 12:30 PM to 2:30 PM PST
      Wynn, Convention Promenade, Margaux 2
    • Thursday, December 5 from 12:30 PM to 2:30 PM PST
      MGM Grand, Level 1, Grand 118

Speakers:

  • Venkata Moparthi, Senior Solutions Architect, Amazon Web Services
  • Edward Schaefer, Solutions Architect, Amazon Web Services

Seats are currently full, but walk-up spots may be available. Make sure to arrive early to secure your place.

Why You Should Attend

AWS re:Invent is the premier cloud conference, bringing together the brightest minds and the latest innovations. At Prowler, we’re committed to simplifying cloud security and compliance, empowering you to focus on what you do best. Whether at our booth or during an AWS session featuring Prowler, this is your chance to see how we’re making cloud security smarter and more accessible.

Stay Updated

Follow us on BlueSky, and LinkedIn for live updates and behind-the-scenes moments during re:Invent 2024.

We can’t wait to see you in Las Vegas!
